title: Earthy Creamy German Potato Gratin
description: A rich and creamy German-inspired potato dish featuring scallions and a blend of earthy flavors, perfect for a solo dinner. This recipe combines the natural sweetness of potatoes with the pungency of scallions and the depth of German temper.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the sliced potatoes and chopped scallions.
In a separate bowl, mix the minced garlic, German temper, salt, and black pepper.
Add the garlic-temper mixture to the potato-scallion bowl and toss to coat.
In a greased 6-inch baking dish, create a layer of potatoes.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with shredded gruyère cheese.
Repeat the layering process until all ingredients are used, finishing with a layer of cheese on top.
Dot the top of the gratin with sour cream.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
